_publications._publicationTitle: Epigenomic, genomic, and transcriptomic landscape of schwannomatosis.

_contextSnippet: demonstrating that SWNTS-SWNs (N = 18) partitioned mainly into one cluster, while NS-SWNs generated two separate clusters (Fig. 4a), suggesting that SWNs that arise in SWNTS patients harbor a distinct transcriptome profile
details: Successfully processed RNA sequencing data that enabled identification of distinct transcriptome profiles, with SWNTS-SWNs partitioning mainly into one cluster while NS-SWNs generated two separate clusters
